generalSituation: The anticyclone aloft over the northern part of the South China Sea is bringing hot weather to the coast of Guangdong. Meanwhile, a southerly airstream is affecting the coast of southern China.
forecastPeriod: Weather forecast for this afternoon and tonight
forecastDesc: Hot with sunny periods in the afternoon. Mainly cloudy tonight. Moderate southerly winds.
outlook: Isolated showers over the weekend. Hot with sunny periods during the day. Becoming fine and very hot in the following couple of days.
